raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against Citibank regarding a {$7000.00} vehicle purchase from Deals for XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. Before I bought the car, I asked the salesperson multiple times whether the vehicle had any electrical, water, or mechanical issues, and they assured me it did not. Within a day, I noticed a burning smell. I reported this immediately, and on XX/XX/XXXX, I returned the car. The salesperson dismissed my concerns, attributing the smell to a cleaning product, even though the electrical issueslike hazard lights turning on by themselvespersisted. 

I provided Citibank with detailed evidence, including reports from an XXXX dealership and a certified mechanic, proving the car was misrepresented and unsafe. Despite this proof, Citibank denied my dispute, relying solely on the merchants claim that I still had the vehicle. I ask the CFPB to investigate this matter thoroughly, as Citibank failed to give proper consideration to the evidence, and I ask that they avoid any retaliatory actions, such as closing my account. 

Thank you for your time and assistance.
